ghosts.name: Asswang
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Reaches max LOS speed in 8.667s instead of the standard 13s.
• Hunt immediately ends if the ghost enters an official hiding spot that contains a detected player.

BEHAVIORS
• If a hunt finishes because of hiding spot entry tracking rules, the entity targets that player location instantly upon starting the next sequence.

ghosts.name: Banshee
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Can only be female, ghost model and ghost name will reflect this.
• Will select a single investigator to exclusively pursue during a hunt.
• Hunts based completely on its specific target's sanity instead of team average.
• 33% chance to give 1 of 20 unique screams through the paramic / sound recorder.

BEHAVIORS
• Target loses 15% sanity if they touch the ghost during a singing ghost event.
• Prefers singing ghost events and will attempt to roam toward their target while in DOTS state.

ABILITIES
• 66% chance to stalk/roam to its target (if inside) without leaving EMF.

ghosts.name: Dayan
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Can only be female, ghost model and ghost name will reflect this.
• Hunt speed and sanity are completely determined by nearby player movement.
• Can hunt at 65% (and moves at 2.25m/s) if nearest player is walking within 10m.

BEHAVIORS
• Drops to 1.2m/s and delays hunt until 45% if the nearby player stands still.
• If ghost is 10m or further, it defaults to standard ghost speed 1.7m/s.
• Has LOS speed-up while greater than 10m from any player. Once within 10m, LOS speed-up is no longer applied.

ghosts.name: Deildegast
ghosts.shortFact: Slowed by thrown items / No LOS speedup
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Base speed of 3.0m/s with no line-of-sight speed-up.
• Can be slowed by throwing unique items near it during a hunt.
• Reaches its minimum speed of 0.4m/s once 30 items have been thrown.

BEHAVIORS
• Slowing is a continuous linear scale, not an on/off state — each thrown item lowers its speed by roughly 3.3% (about 0.087m/s).
• With no items thrown, it stays at its full 3.0m/s.

ghosts.name: Demon
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Can hunt at any sanity.
• Can hunt 60s after being smudged instead of the global standard 90s.

BEHAVIORS
• Retains a brief 20s cooldown delay between previous hunts or crucifix deployments instead of 25s.
• Crucifix radius parameters receive a flat 50% increase check value per tier.

HUNT SANITY
• Hunts normally at 70%.

ghosts.name: Deogen
ghosts.shortFact: Always knows location / Slow near player
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Always has exact LOS of the player during hunts, you cannot hide from a Deogen.
• Moves extremely fast (3.0m/s) far away, but drops to a crawl (0.4m/s) when close.
• 33% chance to give heavy breathing through spirit box when within 1m of the ghost.
• Visibility factor is vastly heightened during the hunt state.
• Does not hunt until 40% average sanity.
• Guaranteed spirit box on difficulties with at least 1 evidence given.

ghosts.name: Gallu
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Cycles through 3 behavioral states [Normal > Enraged > Weakened].
• Becomes Enraged if it steps in salt, is incensed, or uses a crucifix.

HUNT SPEED & SANITY
• 50% sanity / 1.7m/s in Normal State.
• 60% sanity / 1.96m/s in Enraged State.
• 40% sanity / 1.36m/s in Weakened State.

ghosts.name: Goryo
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• DOTS only appear on a video camera and will not show if a player is in the same room.
• Cannot change favorite rooms.

BEHAVIORS
• Less likely to roam and cannot long roam, keeping it within its room more often.
• Will enter DOTS state more frequently than other ghosts.

EVIDENCE
• Guaranteed DOTS on difficulties with at least 1 evidence given.

ghosts.name: Hantu
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Moves faster in colder rooms and slower in warm rooms during hunts.
• Will have visible freezing breath during hunts when the breaker is off/broken.

BEHAVIORS
• Cannot turn on the breaker and is more likely to turn it off.
• Does not speed up in line-of-sight.

EVIDENCE
• Guaranteed freezing on difficulties with at least 1 evidence given.

ghosts.name: Jinn
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• With the breaker on, it will speed up to 2.5m/s if a player is in LOS and far away.
• The Jinn cannot turn off the breaker.

ABILITIES
• With the breaker on, can drop a nearby player’s sanity by 25%, leaving EMF 2 or 5 at the breaker.

HUNT SPEED
• Standard 1.7m/s otherwise. LOS speed-up is still accrued in the background while ability is active.

ghosts.name: Kormos
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Is completely blind; detects players exclusively via sound and electronics.
• Has Pseudo-LOS: builds speed up to 2.21m/s when traveling to detected footsteps.

BEHAVIORS
• Sprinting in the same room as a Kormos can cause it to hunt up to 70% average sanity.
• Will not do 'Ghost Mist' nor 'Chasing' ghost events.

HUNT SPEED
• 1.7m/s otherwise. Accumulated pseudo-LOS speed transfers between states.

ghosts.name: Mare
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Hunts at 60% average sanity if the lights are off, 40% if the lights are on.
• Prefers turning off lights and light bursting events; cannot turn on lights natively.

BEHAVIORS
• More likely to long roam when lights are on in its current room.
• Only ghost that cannot flicker the lights with EMF 2 at the switch.

ABILITIES
• Has a chance to immediately turn off a light switch that a player has turned on within 4m.
• Can use its ability during events, making it the only ghost that can interact with a switch during an event.

ghosts.name: Moroi
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Speed increases drastically as the average team sanity decreases.
• Curses players who hear it on the paramic or spirit box, causing faster passive sanity drain.

HUNT SPEED & BEHAVIOR
• Incense blindness duration during hunts is increased from 5s to 7s.
• Can reach a massive speed of 3.71 m/s when in continuous LOS.

EVIDENCE
• Guaranteed spirit box on difficulties with at least 1 evidence given.

ghosts.name: Myling
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Footsteps and vocals run completely silent once past a 12 meter distance during a hunt.
• Makes sounds through the parabolic microphone / sound recorder more frequently than other ghosts.

ghosts.name: Obake
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Will shapeshift its model for a single blink during hunts at least once per standard hunt.
• Can leave unique 6-fingered, double, or 5-finger prints.

BEHAVIORS
• Has a 25% chance to completely hide ultraviolet evidence.
• 25% chance to miss a footstep during events.

ABILITIES
• Can make fingerprints disappear twice as fast on the map.

EVIDENCE
• Guaranteed ultraviolet on difficulties with at least 1 evidence given.

ghosts.name: Obambo
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Will shift between a 'calm' state (10% sanity) and 'aggressive' state (65% sanity) every 2 minutes.
• Faster when aggressive (1.96m/s), slower when calm (1.45m/s).

BEHAVIORS
• Hunt duration is decreased by 20% when started in an aggressive state.
• Can change states dynamically during a hunt.

ghosts.name: Oni
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Blinks more frequently during hunts, making it highly visible.
• Cannot do Ghost Mist / Airball event.

BEHAVIORS
• Drains 20% sanity during events instead of the standard 10%.
• More active around multiple people.
• More likely to appear as full ghost model during events.

ghosts.name: Onryo
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Flames act like crucifixes; it will prioritize blowing out a flame over a crucifix to prevent a hunt.
• Will attempt to hunt at any sanity after extinguishing a flame, if it has extinguished at least 2 others prior.

BEHAVIORS
• Only ghost that can extinguish the same firelight twice within 20s.
• Cannot light fire sources.
• More likely to extinguish a flame the more players that are dead.

HUNT SANITY
• Hunts normally at 60%, can't hunt until 40% when near lit firelights.

ghosts.name: Phantom
ghosts.shortFact: Barely visible during hunt / Disappears in photo/video
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Blinks visibly slower during a hunt, remaining invisible for longer periods.
• Taking a photo or video of the ghost will cause it to immediately disappear.

BEHAVIORS
• Will not appear in 'Ghost' photos or 'Ghost' videos.
• Player will lose 0.5% sanity /s while in heartbeat range of the ghost during hunts and events.

ABILITIES
• Can roam toward a random player, leaving EMF 2 at the location where it wanders to.

ghosts.name: Poltergeist
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• During hunts, Poltergeists will throw an item every 0.5s with increased force.
• Poltergeist Explosion: can throw multiple objects simultaneously, decreasing nearby sanity by 2% per item.

BEHAVIORS
• Has a higher chance to throw & interact with objects outside of hunts.
• Only ghost that can throw an item while the ghost is in a lit room.

ghosts.name: Raiju
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Speed increases massively to 2.5m/s when near active electronic equipment.
• Causes electronic disruption from 15m away instead of the standard 10m.

BEHAVIORS
• Can hunt at 65% sanity if near active player equipment.
• Has a louder heartbeat sound than other ghosts.
• Has standard LOS speed-up when not near electronics.

ghosts.name: Revenant
ghosts.losTooltip: While it technically doesn't have LOS speedup, when it spots you a Revenant speeds up to 3m/s.
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Moves incredibly fast (3.0m/s) the moment it detects a player (voice, electronics, or LOS).
• Drops to a very slow crawl (1.0m/s) when wandering without a target.

HUNT SPEED
• Gradually slows down after reaching the player's last known location.

ghosts.name: Shade
ghosts.shortFact: Shy / Won't hunt with player in room
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Cannot hunt or do interactions that result in EMF 2, 3, or 5 if in the same room as a player.
• Does not hunt until 35% average sanity.

BEHAVIORS
• Only ghost that can appear as a shadow ghost model on cursed object events.
• More likely to do 'Ghost Mist' events, but cannot perform singing events.
• Chance for doing ghost events decreases the higher average sanity is above 50%.
• Will not blow out firelights while hunting if in the same room as the player.

ghosts.name: Spirit
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Will wait 180s after being incensed before attempting to hunt again, instead of the standard 90s.

ghosts.name: Thaye
ghosts.shortFact: Ages over time / Slower as it ages
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Enters the location highly active and extremely fast (2.75m/s and 75% hunt threshold).
• Ghost attempts to age every 1-2 minutes near players, becoming progressively slower and weaker.

BEHAVIORS
• Hunts at 15% / 1.0m/s at its oldest.
• Age response on Ouija board increases as Thaye ages.
• Only ghost that can have an age of 90+ on the Ouija Board.
• Does not speed up in line-of-sight.

ghosts.name: The Mimic
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Will always show Ghost Orbs as an additional fake evidence, even on 0 evidence.
• Mimics a different ghost every 30 - 120 seconds, taking on all behaviors, tells, and abilities of that ghost.

BEHAVIORS
• Copies the behavior, hunt sanity, and speed of the currently mimicked ghost.

ghosts.name: The Twins
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Can do 2 interactions at the same time, one within its standard radius and the other in its extended radius.
• Ghost speed during hunts will be either 1.5m/s (Main) or 1.9m/s (Decoy).

BEHAVIORS
• Triggering motion sensors, stepping in salt, and spirit box responses only occur at its physical main location.

ghosts.name: Wraith
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Will not touch nor interact with salt in any way.
• Can teleport to a random player, leaving EMF 2 or EMF 5 at their new location.

ABILITIES
• Will not be slowed down by tier 3 salt during a hunt.
• Walks back to their favorite room after teleporting.

ghosts.name: Yokai
ghosts.shortFact: Deaf from far / Can hunt early if talking
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Hearing/detection distance is 2.5m and less during hunts.
• Talking in the same room as a Yokai greatly angers it, causing it to hunt up to 80% average sanity.

BEHAVIORS
• Will start events at 2.5m from the music box instead of the standard 5m.
• Ends music box event when the head of the ghost is 0.5m away from the music box instead of the standard 1m.
• More active when talking near it.

ghosts.name: Yurei
ghosts.tell:
TELLS
• Only ghost that can close or interact with an exit door outside of a hunt/event.
• Incensing the ghost will trap the ghost in its room for the duration of the incense effect (90s).

BEHAVIORS
• Must fully open / shut a door when doing door interactions (outside of a hunt).
• Cannot give DOTS evidence while under the effects of an incense.

ABILITIES
• Can shut a door and drop sanity of nearby players by 15%.
